author: DominicVainMod
content:
Congratulations to the COPA 2625 Winners!,You’ve proven exactly why your contributions to the Star Atlas ecosystem are unmatched.

 1st Place: Star Atlas Italia (SAI)
 2nd Place: BULK
 3rd Place: Aephia

A huge thank you to all the guilds who stepped up and presented. And thank you to everyone who showed up to support your favorite guilds. You made COPA 2625 unforgettable!

@All Pings @here @Community Week
